Keynotes

In this document, we will be discussing the main points or keynotes that should be considered. These keynotes play a crucial role, as they help to highlight what is important and what needs to be focused on. By paying attention to the keynotes, we can ensure that we are not missing out on any important details or ideas. Additionally, it is important to keep in mind that the keynotes may vary depending on the context or subject matter, so it is always a good idea to be aware of the specific keynotes that apply to any given situation.

Each service has its own page with full details, format options, and FAQs.

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner column_margin="default" column_direction="default" column_direction_tablet="default" column_direction_phone="default" text_align="left"][vc_column_inner column_padding="padding-2-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default" enable_animation="true" animation="fade-in-from-bottom" delay="0"][vc_column_text]

Keynote Speaking

Corporate keynotes, conference talks, and university addresses. Bespoke material written for every event — 30-45 minutes that shift how an audience thinks, feels, and acts.

Find out more →
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding="padding-2-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default" enable_animation="true" animation="fade-in-from-bottom" delay="150"][vc_column_text]

Workshops

Interactive sessions on storytelling, creativity, and identity for schools, universities, and corporate teams. 90 minutes to a full day, in-person or virtual.

Find out more →
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin="default" column_direction="default" column_direction_tablet="default" column_direction_phone="default" top_padding="20" text_align="left"][vc_column_inner column_padding="padding-2-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default" enable_animation="true" animation="fade-in-from-bottom" delay="300"][vc_column_text]

Live Performances

Spoken word sets for festivals, galas, awards evenings, and cultural events. Standalone or integrated into a wider programme. Bespoke commissioned pieces available.

Find out more →
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding="padding-2-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default" enable_animation="true" animation="fade-in-from-bottom" delay="450"][vc_column_text]

Brand Collaborations

Voiceovers, bespoke written pieces, and creative campaigns with brands. Past clients include Nike, BBC, Meta, and BT. Values-led — selective about fit.

Find out more →
